channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Some key groups moved toward Trump in 2024. Here’s what they think now, according to AP-NORC polls
Cotton pushes bill to help critical infrastructure defend against drone threat
item.description: Cotton says current law leaves U.S. power grids, wastewater plants, and other high-risk sites exposed to emerging drone threats.

item.title: Iran touts video of ship seizures as Trump keeps quiet on his next move
item.description: Iran releases video showing commandos seizing ships in the Strait of Hormuz as Trump remains largely silent on his next move in the war.

item.title: Justice Department eases restrictions on some marijuana products
item.description: The order places FDA-approved products containing marijuana and state-regulated medical marijuana products at a lower drug classification.

item.title: Iran live updates: Trump orders Navy to 'shoot,' 'kill' boats putting mines in strait
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: WATCH: Kids of 'GMA' take over the studio
item.description: As “Bring a Kid to Work Day” is celebrated, employees’ children ask their parents questions.

item.title: WATCH: Daring rescue for 2 families stuck on cliff
item.description: Authorities say two families were hiking along the coastline when the tide quickly came in, leaving them stranded along the rocky edge.

item.title: John Phelan out as Navy secretary in latest high-profile Trump admin. departure
item.description: Navy Secretary John Phelan is leaving his role effective immediately, chief Pentagon spokesman Sean Parnell said​ Wednesday.

item.title: State-licensed medical marijuana reclassified as less dangerous drug
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche signed an order on Thursday reclassifying state-licensed medical marijuana as a less dangerous drug.

item.title: US jobless claim filings rise modestly to 214,000 last week, remain at healthy levels
item.description: The number of Americans filing for unemployment benefits inched up last week but remains within the historically healthy range of recent years

item.title: Can creditors restart collections after a debt relief program ends?
item.description: Finishing a debt relief program doesn't guarantee that creditors are gone for good. Here's what to know.

item.title: Trump reclassifies state-licensed medical marijuana as a less-dangerous drug in a historic shift
item.description: President Donald Trump’s acting attorney general has signed an order reclassifying state-licensed medical marijuana as a less-dangerous drug.

item.title: Chemical leak at a West Virginia plant kills 2 people and sends 30 more to hospitals, officials say
